name: dacx
description: Fast, lightweight cross-platform music and video player for Windows, macOS, and Linux.

scripts.build:win: npm run sync-version && fvm flutter pub get && npm run patch:media-kit:win-cmake && node scripts/flutter-build-windows.js
scripts.build:mac: npm run sync-version && fvm flutter pub get && npm run check:mac:toolchain && node scripts/flutter-build-macos.js
scripts.build:linux: npm run sync-version && fvm flutter pub get && npm run patch:media-kit:linux-cmake && fvm flutter build linux --release
scripts.b: git fetch origin && git reset --hard && git clean -fd && git switch -C beta origin/beta && git reset --hard origin/beta && git clean -fd && npm run vi
scripts.r: git fetch origin && git reset --hard && git clean -fd && git switch -C main origin/main && git reset --hard origin/main && git clean -fd && npm run vi && npm run gitprune:force
scripts.u: npm update && npm run sync-version && node scripts/update-metainfo.js && npm run format && npm run test:all
scripts.win-compiler:arm64: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NoExit -Command "& 'C:\Program Files\Microsoft Visual Studio\18\Community\Common7\Tools\Launch-VsDevShell.ps1' -SkipAutomaticLocation -Arch arm64 -HostArch amd64"
scripts.release:prepare: npm run setup:flutter && npm run release:warn && npm run sync-version && fvm flutter pub get && node scripts/update-metainfo.js && npm run licenses && npm run dist:clean
scripts.release:finalize: dotenv -e .env -- node scripts/post-release-assets.js && git fetch origin && git reset --hard @{u} && git clean -fd
scripts.release:win: npm run release:prepare && npm run build:win && npm run release:package:win && npm run release:sign:gpg && npm run release:finalize
scripts.release:mac: npm run check:mac:toolchain && npm run release:prepare && npm run build:mac && npm run release:mac:ssh && npm run release:mac:codesign && npm run release:sign:gpg && npm run release:finalize
scripts.release:linux: npm run release:prepare && npm run build:linux && npm run release:package:linux && npm run release:sign:gpg && npm run release:finalize
scripts.localbuild:mac: npm run build:mac && npm run release:package:mac && dotenv -e .env -- node scripts/post-release-assets.js
scripts.localbuild:mac:sign: npm run check:mac:toolchain && npm run release:prepare && npm run build:mac && npm run release:mac:ssh && npm run release:mac:codesign && dotenv -e .env -- node scripts/post-release-assets.js
scripts.localbuild:win: npm run build:win && npm run release:package:win && dotenv -e .env -- node scripts/post-release-assets.js
scripts.localbuild:linux: npm run build:linux && npm run release:package:linux && dotenv -e .env -- node scripts/post-release-assets.js
